title: CustomizableRanks
description: This Plugin lets you create Customizable Ranks
body:
CustomizableRanks
  CustomizableRanks is a full rank management system for Paper servers with GUI editing, hex/gradient styling, per-rank
  toggles, player assignment, unlock conditions, and live display integration.

  ### Features

  - Create, delete, rename, and edit ranks in-game
  - Custom prefix/suffix and hex color support
  - Gradient + animation support per rank
  - Weight/priority-based rank ordering
  - Per-rank display toggles:
      - Tab list
      - Chat
      - Nametag
      - Global toggle
  - Player rank management (online + offline)
  - Rank permissions management (add/remove nodes)
  - Unlock system support (configurable conditions)
  - Full GUI workflow for rank and player management
  - Config + YAML data persistence
  - Reload support

  ### Display Systems

  - Tab list: rank prefix and sorting by weight
  - Chat: [Prefix] Player: message with color support
  - Nametag: prefix above player using teams/scoreboard

  ### Commands

  - /ranks - Open main GUI
  - /ranks create <name>
  - /ranks delete <name>
  - /ranks set <player> <rank>
  - /ranks reload

  ### Permission

  - customizableranks.admin

  ### Technical

  - Paper 1.21.x
  - Java 21
  - Adventure API components
  - No external dependencies required
